description: Composition Cream printed kurta made of 100% cotton fabric, has short sleeves with a purple border and gold lace at the cuffs, a deep V-neckline with a purple border around the neckline, gold lace and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5&rsquo 9&rdquo and chest 33&rdquo
